subhead: We scan your site and generate high-converting, on-brand creatives in seconds
featuresHeading: From raw URL to on-brand ads in one platform
howTitle: From URL to on-brand ad creatives in three steps
step1Description: Drop any link and Aphilio launches it in a real browser session, reading your live page exactly as it renders to your users.
step2Title: We extract your full brand DNA
step2Description: Colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and marketing angles are captured and structured into a reusable DNA profile in your workspace.
step3Description: Use your DNA profile in Ad Studio or AI Chat to generate on-brand images, copy, and ads across all formats in seconds, always perfectly on-brand.
featureSourceDescription: Paste any SaaS URL and get a complete brand profile: colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and positioning angles, extracted from the live site in seconds using a real browser.
featureShipDescription: Select marketing angles, choose your ad templates and formats (1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9), and generate a full batch of on-brand creatives, all grounded in your exact DNA profile.
featureLibraryDescription: Every generated creative saved automatically in one place, organized by brand and session, easy to revisit, download, and reuse across campaigns.
featureAccountDescription: Describe what you need in plain language. Aphilio pulls your brand DNA as context and generates on-brand visuals directly in the conversation, no additional briefing required.
ctaBandTitle: Paste your URL. Get on-brand ads.
ctaBandDescription: Sign in and start generating creatives instantly.
whyTitle: Built different from every generic AI ad tool
whyItem1Desc: We open your URL in an actual browser session so we capture what users see: live colors, rendered fonts, and real images, not raw HTML.
whyItem2Desc: Colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and marketing angles, all structured into a reusable DNA profile that lives in your workspace forever.
whyItem3Title: AI outputs locked to your brand
whyItem3Desc: Every generated image, headline, and ad is grounded in your exact DNA profile. The AI stays on-brand without you writing a single brief.
whyItem4Desc: Square, portrait, story, and landscape, generate all four aspect ratios at once and ship to any placement without manual resizing.
pricingSubtitle: Full access to every feature. Switch or cancel anytime.
pricingProF2: Ad Creative Studio, all formats & layouts
pricingProF3: Brand-aware AI chat with image generation
